name: partnermarket-global-crm
description: Cloudflare-native multi-workspace relationship CRM with integrated business email

scripts.check: node --check src/worker.js && node --check src/email.js && node --check src/email-worker.js && node --check src/intelligence.js && node --check src/lib/domain.js && node --check src/lib/email.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check public/email.js && node --check public/intelligence.js && node --check scripts/dev-server.mjs && node --check scripts/preflight-production.mjs
scripts.deploy:all: npm run deploy:email && npm run deploy
